subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth, and verily it doth admonish the people with that which shall profit them in this world and in the world to come. Yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و انه یعظ الناس بما ینفعهم فی الدنیا و الاخره ولکن القوم
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
